title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic's GTM team built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by Claude API and Claude Code that drafts customer replies in the user's voice. The tool was developed by Jared Sires, a former account executive with no coding experience, to reduce administrative work for sales reps.
